itemJSON.title: itemJSON
itemJSON.description: Required. JSON array of items with article name, size, and quantity. Example: [{"article":"Blouse de travail","taille":"M","quantite":2}]

customerEmail.title: customerEmail
customerEmail.description: Required. The email address of the customer to find their contact record.

caseDescription.title: caseDescription
caseDescription.description: Optional. Description or comments for the case/demande.
